reasoning: By mid-February 2026, gold is trading around $4,600 to $5,800, having seen extremely high volatility and recent all-time highs near $5,400. To hit $10,000 by the end of February (in less than two weeks), the price would need to literally double from its recent historic peaks. Such a price movement in an immensely liquid and established global market like gold is essentially impossible without an unprecedented global systemic collapse within the next few days. The Polymarket price for this exact contract was at 0.00% earlier in February. Thus, the probability is negligible and I am placing it at the absolute lowest allowed limit.
